name: Chicken Angelo
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone the chicken breasts and cut into quarters.
2. Dredge in flour. Shake off excess flour.
3. Heat 1/4 cup butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. When hot, add chicken pieces and brown on all sides.
5. Add oregano, broth, mushrooms, artichoke hearts, and parsley.
6. Saute over high heat until sauce thickens, stirring constantly.
7. Serve immediately.
